title: shelff Category List
description: Ordered list of categories. Stored at .shelff/categories.json in the shelff documents directory.

version.description: Schema version. Must be 1 for this version of the specification.

categories.description: Ordered list of categories. The 'order' field of each item reflects its position in the list.

name.description: Category name. Must be non-empty after trimming whitespace. Unique within the list.

order.description: Display order (0-indexed). Should be contiguous and match the array index after normalization.
